changes.description: Complete rewrite for report-only behavior. Parses TASK_DONE footer, calls report-done (not close). Removed all close logic.
Rewrote generate_implement_prompt() to emit report-done instructions instead of close. Added TASK_DONE footer requirement and never-close rule.
Updated from claim/close to claim/report-done cycle. Added TASK_DONE footer and never-close rule.
Changed close to report-done in success path. Added TASK_DONE footer requirement.
